subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! Rejoice thou, inasmuch as the Ocean of Forgiveness hath turned toward thy brother who hath ascended unto God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل ان افرح بما توجه بحر الغفران الی اخیک الذی صعد الی الله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude
